jsonld.name: Prompt-Voice Schism
jsonld.description: The experience of detecting two distinct linguistic registers within a single user message: the natural voice in which the user thinks and communicates, and the calibrated 'prompt voice' they adopt when addressing an AI—with the schism revealing, at the seam, the gap between who the user is and what they believe they need to perform to get useful output.
